data.name: Hentai Shion
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Shion is an adult game ruled by luxury, danger, and temptation.

Shion is not just a beautiful girl, but a true mafia lady: strict, cold, self-confident, and incredibly sexy. Her piercing gaze, elegant suit, and commanding charisma make it clear at once — this is a woman who is used to controlling everything. But behind that severity hides a hot and seductive nature that reveals itself more and more with every new level.

In Hentai Shion, you will find a combination of enjoyable mini-games and explicit anime illustrations. Complete levels, unlock new looks for Shion, and watch as her restrained mafia style gradually transforms into bolder, more provocative, and more passionate images.

🔹 Game features:

Two challenges in one level:

First — a classic memory game where you need to find matching pairs.

After that — a puzzle featuring Shion, unlocked after completing the first part.

After finishing both stages, you receive a full explicit illustration of Shion in a new outfit.

Lots of content:

24 levels in each mini-game — 48 exciting stages in total.

The further you progress, the more explicit, hotter, and bolder Shion’s looks become.

Additionally:

Achievements for those who want to unlock everything.

A gallery for viewing all unlocked illustrations.

Three difficulty levels: easy, normal, and hard.

Hentai Shion is a blend of mafia aesthetics, feminine power, and erotic tension. Complete levels, unlock new scenes, and dive into a world where strictness, style, and temptation merge into one dangerously alluring image.

data.short_description: Hentai Shion is an adult game in a mafia style, where the strict and sexy Shion leads you through a world of luxury, power, and temptation. Complete mini-games, unlock explicit illustrations, and dive into an atmosphere of danger and passion.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
